race.description: H Francis & Co Stock & Station Agents Maiden Plate
race.comment: JUST HEAR ME OUT (7) put the writing on the wall last time when a close second at this track over 1200m. Peaking now and won't be bothered by the extra 200m. Leading player. CENTRAL OTAGO (3) has made a promising start to his career and should be hitting his straps now after being narrowly denied last time at Goulburn. Likely to drift back from the draw and be charging hard late. EAGLE CRESCENT (12) closed strongly to the line on debut here when filling a minor spot. Is sure to have come on from that and is sharpened by the blinkers. Should attract a lot more support this time. DIVINE SPARK (15) has her first run for the Widdison yard and sets up nicely for this fourth-up after a solid chasing effort at Colac. Fitter and will appreciate the extra 200m. KIWI HARMONY (14) is another likely improver that's worth some thought.
